services.title: Our Services | Evawero Digital Solutions
services.metaDescription: AI strategy, business automation, custom web development, and digital branding. Get a free assessment and start transforming your business today.
services.heading: Our Services
services.heroBody: Technology should work for your business, not the other way around. Here is how we help.

items.question: How long does an AI strategy project typically take?
items.answer: Most AI strategy engagements run 4 to 8 weeks, depending on complexity. We start with a 1-week assessment, then move into solution design and implementation.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge to work with you?
items.answer: Not at all. We translate business challenges into technical solutions. You focus on your business goals, we handle the technology.

items.question: What industries do you work with?
items.answer: We work across industries including finance, logistics, professional services, retail, and manufacturing. Our solutions are tailored to each client's specific needs.

items.question: How much does it cost to get started?
items.answer: We offer a free Digital Readiness Assessment to understand your needs. Project costs depend on scope, but we work with businesses of all sizes and always discuss budget upfront.

items.question: Can you integrate with our existing tools and systems?
items.answer: Yes. We specialise in integrating AI and automation with your existing tech stack, whether that is Google Workspace, Salesforce, custom databases, or legacy systems.

services.ctaBody: Book a free assessment and we will help you figure out the best next step for your business.

ai.title: AI Strategy & Integration
ai.description: Develop and implement AI solutions tailored to your business goals.
ai.fullDescription: We help you identify where AI can create the most impact in your business, then design and implement solutions that deliver measurable results. From automated workflows to intelligent data analysis, we bring AI from concept to production.
ai.whoIsItFor: CEOs, operations managers, and business owners looking to leverage AI for competitive advantage.

automation.title: Business Process Automation
automation.description: Streamline operations with intelligent automation that saves time and reduces errors.
automation.fullDescription: We analyse your existing workflows, identify bottlenecks and manual processes, then design automated solutions that free your team to focus on high-value work.
automation.whoIsItFor: Businesses with repetitive manual processes, growing teams that need to scale operations efficiently.

web.title: Custom Web Solutions
web.description: Modern, responsive web applications built to solve your specific business problems.
web.fullDescription: From customer-facing platforms to internal tools, we build web applications that are fast, secure, and designed around your users.
web.whoIsItFor: Businesses needing custom platforms, SaaS products, dashboards, or client portals.

brand.title: Brand & Digital Strategy
brand.description: Build a strong digital presence with a clear strategy that drives growth.
brand.fullDescription: We help you define your brand positioning, develop your digital strategy, and create a roadmap for growth.
brand.whoIsItFor: Startups, SMEs, and professionals looking to establish or strengthen their digital presence.

products.title: Our Products | Evawero Digital Solutions
products.metaDescription: AI-powered tools for business: Evas Intelligence briefings, autonomous AI Agent Systems, and Evawero CMS. Try free or get a custom quote.
products.heading: Our Products
products.heroBody: Tools we build and ship. Designed to solve real problems for real businesses.

items.question: What is Evas Intelligence?
items.answer: Evas Intelligence is an AI-powered platform that scans your Gmail and news feeds, then delivers a prioritised intelligence briefing with action steps every morning.

items.question: How do AI Agent Systems work?
items.answer: We build custom AI agents tailored to your brand and workflows. They run on a schedule, handling marketing, sales outreach, project delivery, and reporting autonomously. You review and approve their work.

items.question: What is a headless CMS?
items.answer: A headless CMS separates content management from presentation. You create content in one place and deliver it to any platform: your website, mobile app, email templates, or digital signage, all via API.

items.question: Can I try before committing?
items.answer: Yes. Evas Intelligence has a free tier you can start with immediately. For AI Agent Systems and Evawero CMS, we offer a free consultation to scope your needs before any commitment.

items.question: Do you offer ongoing support?
items.answer: Absolutely. All our products include support. For agent systems and CMS, we provide ongoing optimisation, monitoring, and updates as part of our service.

products.moreComingSoonBody: We are always building. Stay tuned for new tools designed to help businesses operate smarter.

ei.label: Featured Product
ei.name: Evas Intelligence
ei.tagline: Your briefing. Already done. Every morning.
ei.description: AI-powered platform that scans your Gmail and news feeds, then delivers a prioritised intelligence briefing with action steps. Built for CEOs, consultants, and investors across Nigeria and Europe.
features: Inbox Intelligence — AI analysis of your Gmail
Market Intelligence — curated RSS and news monitoring
Content Creation — AI-assisted content from your signals
steps: AI scans and extracts key signals
ei.pricingFreeDesc: Basic inbox scanning and insights. Perfect for getting started.
ei.pricingProDesc: Full AI insights, action dashboard, and priority support.

agents.label: New
agents.name: AI Agent Systems
agents.tagline: Your business, running smarter — even while you sleep.
agents.description: Custom AI agents that handle your marketing, sales outreach, client delivery, and daily operations autonomously. Each agent is tailored to your brand, market, and workflow — creating content, finding leads, managing projects, and reporting back to you with what matters.
features: Marketing Agent — Creates on-brand content for your blog and social channels, tailored to your audience and market
Sales Agent — Finds qualified prospects, drafts personalised outreach, and manages your lead pipeline
Delivery Agent — Breaks down client projects into actionable plans, scaffolds deliverables, and drafts communications
Manager Agent — Monitors all activity, sends you executive digests, and alerts you only when your attention is needed
steps: We analyse your business, brand, and workflows
We build and configure your custom agent team
Agents run on schedule — creating, prospecting, reporting
You review, approve, and stay in control
agents.pricingDesc: Every agent system is built around your specific brand, market, and workflows. Pricing depends on the number of agents, run frequency, integrations, and level of customisation. Book a free consultation to discuss your needs.

cms.label: New
cms.name: Evawero CMS
cms.tagline: Your content, everywhere. One backend, any frontend.
cms.description: A lightweight headless CMS built for businesses that need flexibility without complexity. Define your own content types — blog posts, team bios, FAQs, products, case studies, whatever your business needs. Create and manage content through a clean admin panel with a rich text editor. Serve it to any frontend: your website, mobile app, digital signage, or email templates.
features: Custom Content Types — Define the exact content structure your business needs, not a one-size-fits-all template
Clean Admin Panel — Your team can use it without training. Rich text editor, draft/publish workflow, media library
API-First — Connects to any frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, WordPress, Webflow, mobile apps
Multi-Platform — One content source for your website, app, kiosk, email templates, or any other channel
Optional AI Content Agent — Pair with our AI Agent System and your content writes itself, on-brand and on-schedule
steps: We scope your content needs and define your content types
We set up your CMS with a tailored admin panel
Your team creates and manages content through a clean interface
Your frontend fetches content via API — any platform, any framework
cms.pricingDesc: Every business is different. Pricing depends on the number of content types, storage needs, and whether you want the AI Content Agent add-on. We will scope a CMS setup tailored to your business.

about.title: About Us | Evawero Digital Solutions
about.metaDescription: Digital transformation agency operating in Nigeria and Germany. Meet the team helping businesses leverage AI, automation, and modern technology.
about.heading: About Evawero Digital

story.heading: Our Story
story.p1: Built at the intersection of Nigeria and Europe, Evawero Digital Solutions exists to close the gap between where businesses are and where technology can take them.
story.p2: Too many companies are held back by outdated systems, manual processes, and a gap between what technology can do and what they are actually using. We exist to close that gap.
story.p3: From our roots in business analysis, we have expanded into web development, AI automation, and full digital transformation, always guided by data, always tailored to the client.

founder.name: Evawero Ukpevo
founder.bio: Evawero Ukpevo is the founder of Evawero Digital Solutions. He holds dual master's degrees in Business Informatics and Business Intelligence from universities in Germany and France, with a foundation in computer science from Nigeria. Over the past six years, he has worked across e-commerce consulting, business intelligence, and digital transformation, helping businesses in both Nigeria and Germany bridge the gap between their operations and the technology available to them. That experience across both markets is what shaped Evawero Digital Solutions: a consultancy built to help businesses leverage technology practically, not theoretically.

mission.heading: Empowering businesses through intelligent technology
mission.body: Evawero Digital Solutions exists to close the gap between where businesses are and where technology can take them. We combine deep technical expertise with practical business understanding to deliver solutions that create real, measurable impact.
